sourceSummary.oneLine: Testing scope No. KT155 lists electrical testing capabilities across measuring instruments, household electrical machinery, wired/wireless communication devices, medical devices, EMC, and energy efficiency.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use as evidence of listed test methods, product/material categories, test ranges, site designation, and field-testing status in the KT155 testing scope.
keyPoints: The scope includes section 03 Electrical Testing with subsections for measuring instruments, electrical machinery for households, wired/wireless communication devices, medical devices, EMC, and energy efficiency.

Medical-device testing includes IEC/EN 60601 general, collateral, and particular standards, including diagnostic X-ray equipment, radiography/radioscopy, interventional X-ray, CT, mammography, and dental X-ray equipment.
EMC testing includes medical electrical equipment standards such as EN/IEC 60601-1-2 and EN/IEC/ISO 80601 or 60601 particular standards with conducted/radiated emission and immunity test ranges.

For many medical X-ray standards, listed measurement ranges include tube voltage 35 kVp to 160 kVp, radiation dosage 15 nGy to 1 000 Gy, current time 0.1 mAs to 9 999 mAs, and current 0.1 mA to 3 000 mA.
The listed site and field-testing columns repeatedly show BS and N.

evidence.claim: The document is associated with scope number KT155.
The scope is within Electrical Testing.
The source lists Medical devices as an Electrical Testing product/material category.
The source lists EMC as an Electrical Testing category.
EN 60601-1 and IEC 60601-1 are listed for medical electrical equipment general basic safety and essential performance testing.
